name: libqt6sql6-sqlite
title: libqt6sql6-sqlite
description:
Qt 6 SQLite 3 database driver
This package contains the SQLite 3 plugin for Qt 6.
.
Install it if you intend to use or write Qt programs that are to access an
SQLite 3 DB.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libqt6sql6-sqlite because Qt 6 SQLite 3 database driver.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libqt6sql6-sqlite as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libqt6sql6-sqlite with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libqt6sql6-sqlite --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
